Markwise sample.md

Nimbus — Product Brief

Overview

Nimbus is a collaborative notebook for small product teams who live in markdown. It ships by Q3 of next year.

The core promise is simple: write once, review anywhere. Reviewers comment inline, and an agent applies the edits.

Market

The market is large and growing. Our wedge is teams already drafting specs in plain text.

Pricing

We will charge a flat $12 per seat per month, billed annually.

Timeline

A private beta opens in spring, with general availability to follow.

Open Risks

Adoption hinges on the editor integrations landing on schedule.

ReplaceQ3 → Q4
InsertEarly access starts even sooner.

agentMay 28
